entry.summary: Implemented V1 commit-helper planner plan but did not archive because repo-wide make check fails on pre-existing ruff lint errors outside new files. New files pass targeted ruff and pytest.

entry.decision: /do-it completion requires repo-wide make check to pass with no pre-existing/unrelated failure exception
entry.why_good: Prevents plan archival/reporting as complete while repository validation is red; user explicitly chose strict full-validation policy.

entry.decision: /do-it completion requires full repo-wide validation suite, not a hardcoded make check only
entry.why_good: Generalizes strict completion policy across projects with different validation commands while preserving this repo's aggregate make check gate.
